emails.subject: HPLC/Ocean Energy Inc. 09/99 Purchase
emails.body: HPLC/Ocean Energy Inc. 09/99 Purchase Daren, There are five HPLC purchase deals for 09/99 from Ocean Energy Inc. They were Craig Falbaum's deals. A person who is no longer in my group suspended payment for these deals. Gary suggested that I contact you and see if you have any insight as to why the deals might have been suspended, or know anything that might help. Thanks.

emails.subject: Re: HPLC/Ocean Energy Inc. 09/99 Purchase
emails.body: Re: HPLC/Ocean Energy Inc. 09/99 Purchase I have no idea why payment would be suspended. I don't remember having any problems with Ocean Energy. Sorry. D Cynthia Hakemack 10/02/2000 05:19 PM

emails.subject: Re: HPLC/Ocean Energy Inc. 09/99 Purchase
emails.body: Thanks Daren, I just found the answer this afternoon. We paid Seagull. Ocean Energy bought Seagull, and Pam Boxx included this deal with her net to Seagull. We just need to move the suspense amount. Thanks. Daren J Farmer 10/03/2000 05:04 PM
